name: Latest OS Template
description: Download latest operating system template for Proxmox

parameters.name: Operating System Type
parameters.description: One of alpine, debian, ubuntu. Base template to download

parameters.name: Version
parameters.description: OCI image tag / version to deploy (e.g. '1.2.3', 'v4.12.3'). Explicit versions are required so registry-mirror caches stay deterministic and tests reproduce cleanly. Reconfigure does not execute this template, so the reconfigure path inherits the tag already stored in the container's notes.
